nasb.text: Then immediately the brethren sent Paul out to go as far as the sea; and Silas and Timothy remained there.

esv.text: Then the brothers immediately sent Paul off on his way to the sea, but Silas and Timothy remained there.

cnv.text: 弟兄們立刻把保羅送到海邊去；西拉和提摩太仍然留在比里亞。

ccb.text: 庇哩亚的弟兄姊妹立刻送保罗到海边，西拉和提摩太仍然留在庇哩亚。

csbs.text: 于是弟兄们立刻送保罗往海边去，赛拉斯和提摩太仍然留在庇里亚。
